channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. EPA Finalizes Historic New Renewable Fuel Standards to Strengthen American Energy Security, Support Rural Economies  U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (.gov)

  4. EPA Finalizes RFS: Reallocates 70% of Gallons Waived by Refinery Exemptions  DTN Progressive Farmer
  5. Iowa farm groups welcome ethanol, biodiesel blending requirements  The Des Moines Register

item.title: US appeals court overturns $16bn Argentina ruling in blow to Burford Capital - Financial Times
item.description:

item.title: Robyn: Sexistential review – pop doyenne returns with emotional grenades and a new philosophy - The Guardian

item.title: How long will the war last? No one knows, and it's making oil prices weird - NPR
item.description:
1. How long will the war last? No one knows, and it's making oil prices weird  NPR
  2. With Hormuz still shut, options market signals rising risk of $150 oil  Reuters
  3. This map shows a crude ticking time bomb that hits much of the world’s oil supply in April  MarketWatch
  4. The Cushion Is Gone and the Oil Market Is Now Exposed  Crude Oil Prices Today | OilPrice.com
  5. Oil prices soar past $110 a barrel again after Iran says Strait of Hormuz is closed  The Independent
